# krateo-core-provider-chart (chart repo) — LLM doc index

> krateo-core-provider-chart is the **deployment unit** for core-provider, the Krateo
> **composition engine**: the Helm chart that runs core-provider + its sidecar workloads
> (chart-inspector, composition-dynamic-controller assets), the dedicated CRD subchart that
> publishes the two static `core.krateo.io` CRDs (`CompositionDefinition`, `KubernetesTarget`),
> the `target-chart` that primes remote deployment targets, and the federated agent chart. This
> index is the agent entry point to the **deployment, CRD and wiring** view. The **internals &
> runtime** view lives in the code repo `braghettos/krateo-core-provider` `docs/`.

## How to use this index (agents)

You are reading the docs for a SPECIFIC deployed version. This is the **chart-repo half** of the
component docs — deployment, CRDs, and wiring. Fetch every file below **at the CHART tag that matches
the running build**, not `main`:

- chart version = `CompositionDefinition.spec.chart.version` for core-provider → THIS repo's tag.
  Read this repo's `docs/` at that tag.
- The **internals view** (the crdgen pipeline, the cdc reconcile loop, remote-target connection) is
  the OTHER half: read `braghettos/krateo-core-provider` `docs/llms.txt` at the **image-version**
  tag = the core-provider Deployment's container image tag (= this chart's `appVersion`).

If something isn't in the docs, read the chart/CRD source at that same tag — don't guess, and don't
trust `main` for a deployed older version. The agent chart (`kagent/chart`, `0.1.x`) versions
independently of the core-provider component it speaks for — do not read its version as the
component's.

## Start here

- [overview.md](overview.md): what core-provider is and **how it deploys** as a Krateo composition —
  the four-chart layout (`chart/` engine + sidecars, `crds-subchart/` CRDs, `target-chart/` remote
  prereq, `kagent/chart` agent), the self-managing CompositionDefinition, and what the app chart
  renders (the core-provider Deployment, the chart-inspector sidecar Deployment/Service, the cdc
  asset ConfigMaps, the engine ClusterRole, and the composition-version / max-name-length admission
  policies). Read first.

## Deployment / CRD / wiring

- [crds.md](crds.md): the two **static** CRDs this repo owns from `crds-subchart/` —
  `CompositionDefinition` and `KubernetesTarget` (`core.krateo.io/v1alpha1`): purpose + curated key
  fields (`spec.chart` {url, version, repo, credentials.passwordRef}, `spec.deploy.targetRef`, the
  status `managed`/`target`/`versionInfo`; KubernetesTarget's `spec.kubeconfigRef`). Note: the
  **per-blueprint Composition CRD is DYNAMIC** — core-provider generates it at runtime via crdgen
  and it is intentionally NOT shipped here.
- [wiring.md](wiring.md): the `chart/values.yaml` surface (service `ClusterIP`/80, `resources`,
  `env` debug flags, the nested `chartInspector.*` and `cdc.*` blocks incl.
  `COMPOSITION_CONTROLLER_RESYNC_INTERVAL`, image pinning), how the installer pins+wires it in
  bootstrap mode, dependencies (k8s ≥ 1.36 for the GA `MutatingAdmissionPolicy`), and the real
  gotchas (resync-interval drives self-bootstrap pace, the stale CRD-discovery cache restart, remote
  targets need the `target-chart` policy + RBAC, never bundle the CRD subchart).

## Cross-repo (the internals & runtime half)

- [code-repo docs/llms.txt](https://github.com/braghettos/krateo-core-provider/blob/main/docs/llms.txt):
  the code repo's index → the crdgen pipeline (how `values.schema.json` becomes a typed CRD), the
  composition-dynamic-controller reconcile loop, remote-target connection handling. Versioned at the
  **image** tag (= chart `appVersion`).

## Reference

- [README.md](../README.md): product overview, what each chart ships, how the installer consumes it.
- `chart/` — the app Helm chart (engine + chart-inspector + cdc assets + admission policies;
  `values.yaml` + `values.schema.json`).
- `crds-subchart/` — the `krateo-core-provider-crd` chart (the two static `core.krateo.io` CRDs;
  source of truth for those CRD fields).
- `target-chart/` — the `krateo-core-provider-target` chart (the composition-version policy for
  remote deployment-target clusters).
- `kagent/chart/` — the `krateo-core-provider-agent` chart (the federated specialist agent; versions
  independently).

## Notes

Each doc set is versioned in its own repo: THIS repo's `docs/` at the **chart** tag, the code repo's
`docs/` at the **image** tag. The static CRDs are generated by the code repo's CI and pushed here on
each release — `crds-subchart/Chart.yaml` is authoritative for the CRD subchart version; the
`README.md` table may lag.
